source.description: Checked-in Q1 reference labels fixture for deterministic groundedness summary builds.

sampling.notes: Full checked-in fixture; no runtime sampling; stable ordering expected for deterministic smoke/rebuild workflows.

pii_handling.notes: Example/smoke artefact only; fixture must not contain live user data or recoverable PII.

labels.notes: Per-example labels are carried by the checked-in JSONL fixture for shadow/reference use.

extensions.notes: Example manifest that anchors the Q1 reference lane to a checked-in fixture path without changing runtime gating semantics.
